text.title: Partnership Co-Marketing Playbook Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Partnership Co-Marketing Playbook output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: candidate_partners populated with a typed value
asset_format populated with a typed value
attribution_plan populated with a typed value
contribution_balance populated with a typed value
review_cadence populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
